offer.name: Find Your Niche by Mining Your Own Data
offer.description: A creator workshop that turns a messy archive into a niche thesis, audience map, content pillars, and a 14-day posting experiment board.

payment_link.creation_gate: Jeff approves price and copy first

copy.headline: Find your niche by mining your own data.
copy.description: Bring your messy archive. We help you find the repeated signal, map what your audience will actually care about, and leave with a 14-day posting board that keeps your voice intact.

gates: no checkout link sent externally without Jeff approval
no creator-client data processing without consent boundaries
